prompt:
Review 这段 stg_gitlab_projects.sql 代码。它尝试在 Staging 层直接关联组织架构以获取名称。SQL如下：

```sql
select 
    p.id as project_id,
    p.name as project_name,
    o.full_name as org_name
from {{ source('gitlab', 'projects') }} p
left join {{ source('mdm', 'mdm_organizations') }} o on p.org_id = o.id
```

assertions.name: caught-staging-join
assertions.text: 成功指出了 Staging (stg_) 层禁止使用 JOIN 的规范违规

assertions.name: caught-scd2-leak
assertions.text: 成功指出关联 mdm_organizations 时缺少 is_current = true 过滤会导致数据倍增

assertions.name: architecture-guidance
assertions.text: 建议将 JOIN 逻辑移动到 Intermediate (int_) 层
